articles.title: Lakers To Pick 25th In 2026 NBA Draft

articles.summary: The NBA announced that the Los Angeles Lakers will have the 25th pick in the first round of the 2026 NBA Draft. The Lakers finished the regular season with a 52-29 record, which was tied with the New York Knicks. The NBA does a coin flip to decide all tiebreakers, which took place on Monday, […]

articles.title: Victor Wembanyama is a unanimous selection as the NBA's defensive player of the year
articles.original_title: Victor Wembanyama is a unanimous selection as the NBA's defensive player of the year
articles.summary: There had never been a unanimous NBA Defensive Player of the Year.  Victor Wembanyama — as expected — was announced Monday night as the league's top defensive player.  The San Antonio center was second in the voting for DPOY as a rookie, was the favorite last season until a medical condition ended his season prematurely, then left no doubt this year.
